title: Mindtree is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mindtree is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Mindtree in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindtree:
Mindtree is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindtree!
